headline: Buzz Farming protocol discovery incomplete; website geo-restricted; limited contract address discovery

findings.text: Block explorer search attempted at https://explorer.bsquared.network/ but detailed name-tag search results unavailable due to tool limitations
No canonical deployed contracts documentation page located; docs.bsquared.network accessible but lacks explicit 'Deployments' section with contract listings
No audit PDFs pinned in protocol.audit_links; none discovered through documentation or GitHub search
GitHub organization https://github.com/b2network identified with repositories including b2-token-contract (Solidity); detailed contract deployment artifacts not accessible within fetch budget
Protocol on single chain (BSquared); cannot complete per-chain enumeration due to incomplete D1–D4 results
No factory addresses identified; child contract enumeration deferred pending factory discovery
Role taxonomy deferred; no admin_addresses catalogued due to address discovery failure
No addresses currently meet evidence tracing standard; zero admin_addresses in output

rationale.verdict: Discovery slice blocked by website geo-restriction, limited search tool output, and exhausted fetch budget. Evidence collected confirms B² Network exists and hosts Buzz as a staking/farming product, but specific contract addresses, deployment documentation, and administrative control structure could not be determined. Recommend retry with unrestricted web access and full fetch budget allocation to explorers and GitHub repositories.

evidence.shows: B² Network main website confirms existence of Buzz product ('For User: Buzz' link visible in navigation), describes B² Network as BTC Layer 2 infrastructure
B² Network documentation site with module overview (Mining², B² Hub, B² Rollup, AI Signal, U2 Stablecoin); no explicit deployed contracts table in fetched overview section

B² Network GitHub organization with 41 public repositories including b2-token-contract (Solidity), docs, core infrastructure forks; no detailed source listing for Buzz Farming contracts accessible in fetched profile page
B² Network Blockscout-based block explorer exists; full content unavailable via fetch

unknowns: D1: Block explorer name-tag search for 'Buzz Farming' / 'Buzz' on https://explorer.bsquared.network/ not performed due to tool limitations; no addresses surfaced
D2: Deployed contracts documentation page URL unknown; docs.bsquared.network does not expose explicit deployment listing in accessible sections
D3-offchain: No audit PDFs; protocol.audit_links empty and no audits discovered in fetched website/docs/GitHub
D4: GitHub Buzz Farming or Buzz Staking contract source repository not located; b2-token-contract repo exists but specific Buzz contract addresses/branches not enumerable within fetch budget
D5-offchain: Chain enumeration incomplete; BSquared network is singular pinned chain but block explorer enumeration for this chain was not completed
D6: No factory contract identified; enumeration deferred pending successful D1–D4
D7: Role taxonomy not assigned; zero addresses traced to evidence
D8: Zero addresses meet full evidence tracing; admin_addresses[] is empty

protocol_metadata.about: B² Buzz is a Bitcoin Layer 2 staking and yield farming product launched by B² Network. Users deposit cryptocurrency assets (BTC, ETH, USDC, etc.) and earn Parts which assemble into virtual Mining Rigs to earn native B² tokens. The protocol integrates with B² Network's modular Bitcoin L2 infrastructure and Mining Squared yield routing system.
